title: stelis clipeus
intro: Stelis clipeus, also known as the epiphytic orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family, characterized by its unique and delicate appearance. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, obtained from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Stelis clipeus include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Stelis clipeus is typically prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, by infusing its roots and leaves in water or a solvent like ethanol to extract its medicinal compounds.
